---
title: "50by30 Microdata Pipeline"
---

::: {.callout-important}
## Status
This is a living document under active development.
See the [contributor guide](wiki/contributing.md) before making changes.
:::


This book documents the data pipeline used to **harmonize, upload, review, and publish** microdata used to monitor the UNHCR **50by30 vision**: that 50 percent of refugees in protracted crises are self-reliant by 2035.

## The Pipeline at a Glance

```{mermaid}
%%| label: fig-pipeline
%%| fig-cap: "The 50by30 microdata pipeline"
%%| fig-width: 8
flowchart LR
    raw["<b>1 · Upload<br/>raw<br/>data</b>"]
    rawrev{"<b>2 · Review</b>"}
    dlwraw[("<b>datalibweb</b><br/>FDPRAW")]
    harm["<b>3 · Harmonize data</b><br/>50by30 schema"]
    hup["<b>4 · Upload<br/>harmonized<br/>data</b>"]
    hrev{"<b>5 · Review</b>"}
    dlw[("<b>datalibweb</b><br/>FDP")]

    raw --> rawrev
    rawrev -->|approve| dlwraw
    rawrev -->|reject| raw
    dlwraw --> harm
    harm --> hup
    hup --> hrev
    hrev -->|approve| dlw
    hrev -->|reject| harm

    classDef step fill:#e8f0fe,stroke:#4285f4,color:#174ea6;
    classDef gate fill:#fef7e0,stroke:#f9ab00,color:#7f6003;
    classDef store fill:#e6f4ea,stroke:#34a853,color:#0d652d;
    class raw,harm,hup step;
    class rawrev,hrev gate;
    class dlwraw,dlw store;
```

The pipeline is documented here in three parts:

1. **[Upload Raw Data](chapters/01-raw-upload.qmd)** — raw microdata and documentation are uploaded via **PRIMUS**, unless it is already available from **datalibweb**.
2. **[Harmonize Data](chapters/02-harmonization.qmd)** — approved raw data is harmonized to the 50by30 schema.
3. **[Upload Harmonized Data](chapters/03-review-approval.qmd)** — harmonized microdata and harmonization scripts are uploaded via **PRIMUS**. Approved files are published to **datalibweb** for 50by30 monitoring.

## Core Harmonized Schema

Every harmonized file must conform to the [50by30 schema](chapters/04-schema.qmd).
The core variables are:

| Variable | Status | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `welfare` | **Mandatory** | Household welfare aggregate (consumption or income) |
| `welfare_self` | **Mandatory** | Self-reliance-adjusted welfare measure |
| `weight` | **Mandatory** | Sampling weight |

See the [Schema & Variable Dictionary](chapters/04-schema.qmd) for the full list,
value ranges, and labeling conventions.
